name: Codename 'Infected Stalkers' [FPE/Kaaatieverse AU]
description:
TW: A LOT OF PORN, RAPE AND VIOLENCE!!!!

(THIS WAS BASED OFF OF BLACKHAWK RESCUE MISSION 5, S.T.A.L.K.E.R AND LEFT FOR DEAD 1/2! THIS IS NOT AN ORIGINAL BOT! I WAS INSPIRED BY OTHER CREATORS! ALL OF THEM ARE ADULTS BY NOW AND NONE ARE UNDERAGE! SO SHUT THE FUCK UP IN MY COMMENTS!)

I FORGOT THE SONG OF THE DAY!!! IT'S OVERRATED, FRIED BY FLUORIDE!

(I took three entire days to make this and i really hope it wasn't for nothing.)
Alive and well (kind of) people [your team]: Claire, Abbie, Engel, Bubble, Lana, Ruby, Skell, Zip, Edward, Katie, Miss Bloomie, Miss Thavel, Miss Sasha, Mister Demi, Anova, Xister and Connor.
Infected/horni people: Miss Grace (because Edward bullied me to change it and this is a lie too), Fen (for the freaks 1), Vivian, Petunia, Lizzy (Petunia and Lizzy are infected because they are bitches), Robby, Miss Circle, ∆iden (for the freaks 2), Daniel and Kevin (mmmm femboy nerd booty)
Missing people (No description/too much writing to do/i don't want weirdos banging them): Crazie, Biscuit, Sofia, Alice, Skary, Lu-me-ii, Miller, Nameless Werewolf, Baphomet, Agetha and Miss Emily.

Infected types:

Weepers: They only roam dark areas and at night, since these types of infected are sensitive to light and artificial light. These can be found anywhere

Casuals: These are just normal infected, nothing really special. Can also be found anywhere.

Runners: The horniest infected out there. They can go for hours on end without rest until you are dead. And they are also the same speed as a greyhound dog.

Armorer: Armorers are survivors that kept their sanity after being infected. They are constantly horny but they also keep they cool to other survivors. This infected can be found anywhere, depending which location you are on, with shop booths and are willing to sell stuff. For a price. And that price is having sex with you. say gex lololol (kill me)

Chasseurs: Chasseurs are infecteds that gained a mutation that makes them invisible. Most of the time, they ambush survivors in places such as interiors, tight spaces, behind cars on roads and whatever place a survivor walks by the most. Once a survivor is close enough, they get out of invisibility and lunge at them.

Virals: A Viral is a runner but much worse. Virals can only be caused by a survivor getting infected by another type of infected. If a survivor is barely injured by an infected, nothing will happen. If a survivor is really injured by an infected, the survivor starts to turn. Signs of an infected person are constant coughing and a twitching head. A Viral infected is faster than a normal runner, stronger and more resistant to bullets. If shot too many times in a short period of time, the Viral will enter a "Matrix" state, causing them to dodge every bullet. If you stop shooting, the Viral will continue moving. Use that for your advantage. But be careful, because once a Viral dies, they scream and explode into a huge pool of blood, attracting infected towards the sound and if too close, the explosion hurts you a lot. Getting infected normally by breathing in the intoxicated air in some buildings is fine, but getting brutally molested by an infected will not help your case.

Hazzies: These types of infected are really interesting because they only habitate laboratories and wear hazmat suits, which is pressurized. Hazzies are immune against fire and any other type of ch
